title: Projection inside within transaction gives wrong results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = 'updated' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE created_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
key_bug_features: Projection inside transaction returns incorrect results
